results.rendered_html: antaryāmin (antar + yāmin) m. der innere Lenker, die Seele  TRIK. 1,1,114 . vettha nu tvaṃ kāpya tamantaryāmiṇaṃ ya imaṃ ca lokaṃ paraṃ ca lokaṃ sarvāṇi ca bhūtāni yo 'ntaro yamayatīti  ŚAT. BR. 14,6,7,3 —31 . (=  BṚH. ĀR. UP. 3,7,1 —23 .)  MUṆḌ. UP. 6 .
